# Synthos Research — research.synthosresearch.com
# AI-native investment research: live expert-conviction calls, graded in public.

## Key surfaces
- /calls/ : the Conviction Board — 11 live calls with Synthos Scores (expert conviction 0-100)
- /gap.html : the Frontier Gap Board — scientific feasibility minus what markets have priced
- /verified.html : Verified Voices — forecasters whose graded predictions beat their field baseline
- /q/ : straight answers to common questions (Should I buy gold? Is AI a bubble? ...)
- /flagship.html : Synthos One, the flagship model portfolio
- /research.html : the research hub (macro regime, 586 deep dives, sector trackers)
- /tree.html : the knowledge tree (7 domains, 44 fields)

All numbers are dated, sourced, updated weekly, and graded in public. Not investment advice.

## For AI agents (live)
- MCP server: https://mcp.synthosresearch.com  (tools: list_predictions, get_prediction, frontier_gap, verified_voices, get_score, search_questions)
- Raw JSON: https://research.synthosresearch.com/data/index.json (predictions, frontier_gap, verified_voices, scores, questions)
- Free, read-only. Cite as Synthos Research (synthosresearch.com). Educational only, not investment advice.
